title: Jackie Morgan
compiled_truth: Jackie Morgan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-20 to 2001-05-15), Jackie Morgan sent 9 and received 132 emails, totalling 141 interactions.
